ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "player_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the player */,
  "player_address" TEXT /* Address of the player */,
  "player_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "player_role" TEXT /* Role of the player */,
  "player_avg_score" REAL /* Average score of the player */,
  "player_strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate of the player */,
  "player_economy_rate" REAL /* Economy rate of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach of the team */,
  "team_city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "team_stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the team plays */,
  "team_win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage of the team */,
  "team_points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the league belongs to */,
  "league_format" TEXT /* Format of the league */,
  "league_season" TEXT /* Season of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leagues_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team playing in the match */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team playing in the match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "match_format" TEXT /* Format of the match */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match */,
  "match_total_runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored in the match */,
  "match_total_wickets" INTEGER /* Total wickets fallen in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_matches" (
  "player_match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-match combination */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored by the player in the match */,
  "balls_faced" INTEGER /* Number of balls faced by the player in the match */,
  "dismissals" INTEGER /* Number of dismissals of the player in the match */,
  "player_match_runs" INTEGER /* Runs scored by the player in the match */,
  "player_match_balls" INTEGER /* Balls faced by the player in the match */,
  "player_match_wickets" INTEGER /* Wickets taken by the player in the match */,
  "player_match_economy_rate" REAL /* Economy rate of the player in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_matches_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_matches_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batting_statistics" (
  "batting_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batting statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the player */,
  "runs_off_bat" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored off the bat by the player */,
  "balls_faced" INTEGER /* Number of balls faced by the player */,
  "50s" INTEGER /* Number of 50s scored by the player */,
  "100s" INTEGER /* Number of 100s scored by the player */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate of the player */,
  "batting_stat_four" INTEGER /* Number of fours hit by the player */,
  "batting_stat_six" INTEGER /* Number of sixes hit by the player */,
  "batting_stat_ducks" INTEGER /* Number of ducks scored by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batting_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batting_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bowling_statistics" (
  "bowling_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bowling statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the player */,
  "overs_bowled" INTEGER /* Number of overs bowled by the player */,
  "wickets_taken" INTEGER /* Number of wickets taken by the player */,
  "economy_rate" REAL /* Economy rate of the player */,
  "bowling_stat_maidens" INTEGER /* Number of maidens bowled by the player */,
  "bowling_stat_no_balls" INTEGER /* Number of no-balls bowled by the player */,
  "bowling_stat_wides" INTEGER /* Number of wides bowled by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bowling_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bowling_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dismissals" (
  "dismissal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dismissal */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player dismissed */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match in which the dismissal occurred */,
  "dismissal_type" TEXT /* Type of dismissal (e.g., bowled, caught) */,
  "dismissal_bowler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bowler who took the dismissal */,
  "dismissal_fielder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fielder who took the catch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dismissal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dismissals_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dismissals_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player injured */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match in which the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., concussion, sprain) */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date of the injury */,
  "injury_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password chosen by the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, coach) */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_videos" (
  "match_video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match video */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match to which the video belongs */,
  "video_file" TEXT /* File path to the video file */,
  "match_video_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the match video */,
  "match_video_size" INTEGER /* Size of the match video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_videos_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
